Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation
Off Calendar Feb-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: PLAINTIFF HELLER EHRMAN LLP'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation is granted. Court sees a proof of service. Judge Kahn, who is hearing this motion, discloses that he was an associate attorney at the Heller Ehrman firm from 1983 to 1987. The prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order after hearing to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/HK)
